query: faded polaroid old photograph yellowed vintage snapshot
message: sub:analog_degradation/faded_polaroid — anti_aesthetic — sepia, yellowing, faded snapshots, browned old photos

response.objective_caption: A person walks a dog along a curved sandy shoreline beside a calm body of water. Sparse trees and low vegetation line the horizon beneath a bright, expansive sky. A long, low structure runs parallel to the horizon behind the tree line. Small waves lap at the shore in the foreground.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person walks a dog along a curved sandy shoreline beside a calm body of water, rendered with heavy motion blur, prominent film grain, and a sickly yellow-green tint. The muted, faded tones wash across the scene, where sparse trees and low vegetation line the horizon beneath an expansive sky. A long structure sits behind the vegetation, while the unstable soft focus and oppressive vintage color cast evoke a heavy atmosphere of melancholy and unease.
